name: Strawberry Spinach Turkey Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons olive oil or salad oil
1/2 yellow sweet pepper, sliced into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss together torn spinach, halved strawberries and bias-sliced green onions in a large bowl; set aside.
2. Rinse turkey breast tenderloin steaks; pat dry. Cut turkey into bite-size strips; set aside.
3. For dressing, combine oil, vinegar, water, dried onion and salt.
4. Heat half of the dressing in a large skillet. Add the pepper rings. Stir-fry for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes or until crisp-tender. Remove pepper rings from the skillet.
5. Heat the remaining dressing in the same skillet. Stir-fry the turkey strips in the hot dressing for 2 to 3 minutes or until no longer pink. Remove from heat.
6. Stir in pepper rings and honey. Pour turkey mixture over spinach mixture. Toss well.
